name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Dominium
title: "[SUGGESTION] "

**What's the suggestion?**
A clear description of what you want added or changed.

**How should it work?**
Describe how you imagine it working in-game. Be as specific as you'd like.

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, mockups, references to other mods, or any other context that might help.
